question: ATTRACTION-2 and its corresponding authors as well as the NCT
final_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Trial name" = 'ATTRACTION-2' AND "NCT" != '' AND "Author" != '';

retrieval_top.candidate_question: ATTRACTION-2 and its corresponding authors as well as the NCT
retrieval_top.candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Nivolumab';

retrieval_top.candidate_question: Which trials have Name of ICI = 'Avelumab'?
retrieval_top.candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Avelumab';
SELECT "NCT", "PubMed ID", "Trial name", "Author", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Avelumab';
